signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% prior, as reported on April 15, per Trading Economics data release schedule and value listing[3]. This exceeds ECB's 2% target and contrasts with prior slowdowns (e.g., December 2025 at 2.0%), potentially shifting ECB rate cut predictions in predict

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, up from February but below 2.4% forecasts, scheduled for April 22 release per Trading Economics[1][3]. Remains near BoK's 2% target amid energy volatility, which could influence Asia rate hold bets[1].
